response.justification: Candidate is a senior individual contributor with strong full-stack and distributed-systems exposure, but the role requires a CTO with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure depth, and a track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+. The resume shows none of these: no executive titles, no team-scaling history, no production agentic AI systems, and only tangential fintech exposure via RIDE Capital. AI-agent work is described as 'contributing to' MCP tooling, not architecting production multi-agent platforms.
strengths: Broad full-stack and distributed-systems experience across high-throughput environments (Sociomantic)
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions
concerns: No executive or senior technical leadership experience; no evidence of scaling teams to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems — only contributor-level agent tooling work
Minimal fintech-infrastructure depth; no credit-risk, working-capital, or regulated-environment architecture experience

key_factors.factor: Lacks executive leadership and team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
